content.text:
Approximate $f'(1)$ for $f(x) = e^x$ using forward, backward, 
and central differences with $h = 0.1$. Compare with the exact value.
Derive the truncation error for the backward difference formula.

Use the central difference to approximate $\sin''(\pi/4)$ with 
$h = 0.1, 0.01, 0.001$. Verify second-order convergence.

Approximate $f''(0)$ for $f(x) = \cos x$ using the three-point 
second derivative formula with $h = 0.2$.
